title: charred light Cornish candy Wrap
description: A delicate and charred Cornish-inspired dish featuring pandan leaf wraps, soy milk, and a hint of sweet candy, perfect for a crowd-pleasing snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: optional: chopped nuts or shredded coconut

instructions: Cut the pandan leaf wraps into 4 equal pieces.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy milk, cornstarch, and water until smooth.
Heat the vegetable oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the candy to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, until caramelized and fragrant.
Brush the pandan leaf wraps with the soy milk mixture and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet and bake for 4 minutes on each side, or until lightly charred.
Serve warm, garnished with chopped nuts or shredded coconut if desired.
